publishedAbstract: * Many `noobaa-endpoint-*` pods are being launched with the error `Pod SMT Alignment Error: requested 1 cpus not multiple cpus per core = 2`.
publishedTitle: Lots of `noobaa-endpoint-*` pods being generated with error `Pod SMT Alignment Error: requested 1 cpus not multiple cpus per core = 2` in ODF 4
